entry.title: VSF + Safetystock SAP ERP
entry.content:
Hallo,

Wir befinden uns im Übergang vom reinen Sicherheitsbestand zur Planung mit Endmontage. Zur Planung wurden Durchschnittswerte der letzten 12 Monatssätze importiert, die sich nun monatlich im MD04 widerspiegeln und einen Bedarf erzeugen. Die Sicherheitsbestände sind noch verfügbar! Haben Sie Erfahrungen mit dem Umgang mit alten Sicherheitsbeständen? Reduzieren Sie stirbt und wenn ja, um wie viel %? Ich würde mich über jede Antwort freuen

entry.title: Re: How to use attributes.ExampleCustomAttribute in a SAP BPA Process?
entry.content:
This parameter seems to have to do with Process Visibility – to learn more, here is a video to start you off: https://youtu.be/qlo2itgC6-U which helps you monitor the processes.

Here, I created a variable for process visibility – newstatus is one of the inputs I defined for the process:

I have many instances, but I can add the parameter to my API call and it will retrieve only the processes that have this variable set to "APPROVED".

If I run it I will get only the instance that I just created using this process visibility variable.

entry.title: Re: Script to another table - Sap Analytic cloud
entry.content: I ment i need the script

entry.title: Re: Script to another table - Sap Analytic cloud
entry.content: I ment i need the script to a button i placed in one page of the story and on click on the button it will take me to a table that is placed on another page in the story

entry.title: Re: Facing issues to create Sales order (Create Record no...
entry.content:
500 is a very generic error message that there was a problem on the server. Can you provide more information, including screenshots?

  • What system are you calling?
  • Assuming OData integration, can you show the destination?
  • Can you show the setup in SAP Build Apps (i.e., the data resource)?
  • Can you show the test screen for the data resource? (I assume you are testing here and it fails.)
  • Can you show the developer tools and the network tab where it shows the payload and response?

Although I would hope it would send a different error, make sure the sales order payload works for your system (i.e., organizations and customers exist, ID is valid).

entry.title: Re: PAGE/APP Variable issue
entry.content: Maybe @Mari can give status of the bug, but there is a clear and easy workaround -- either refresh the page or don't delete "id" before adding other properties 🙂

entry.title: Re: Shipping to Vendor for repair and return
entry.content: Thanks JagdeepSingh. Yes my equipment is serialized component. Can you please eleborate the steps required as i am bit confused. Regular Purchase Requisition created against the local job order(work order) but without material number--> Regular PO using the same created PR --> 541 movement in MIGO to ship to vendor --> Shipping the physical component to vendor through ZLO-DT/Shipment --> Receiving the physical unit back from the vendor --> Perform GR(using MB1B-101) for the PO(initially created without material number). Then the serial number will reflect in my stock location (OR) do i need to perform separate movement to bring the unit in to my stock? Please correct me if i am wrong. Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: CDS-based BOPF to RAP Migration Tool
entry.content:
Thanks Steffen for this great blog.

Thanks for putting so much effort together with Martin Bretzer on this topic in the last two years.

You made it! We kept our promise to all customers who invested into RAP's predecessor: the ABAP Programming Model for SAP Fiori. Our customers can now integrate their investments into RAP and therefore into ABAP Cloud and the future!

entry.title: Re: CDS View: Time comparison
entry.content: Yes It is available from 758 only.

entry.title: PO for inter-company repair and return process
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can you please help with the types of PO to be used for inter-company repair and return process, apart from CCSTO/SSTO(NBA type: C and D). Material-A being shipped from one plant to another plant for repair, in the return Material number has been change to B (Unit price vary) due to configuration requirements and this is affecting financial on repair plant. So we thought of sending the material for repair through PR and PO process. since same equipment number need to be returned back to origin upon repair completion,  it is difficult to identify the difference between regular buying-PO and R&R-PO. So we need your expert advise the right process to follow.

entry.title: Re: CDS View: Time comparison
entry.content: Currently, We are on 2022 FPS 03. Not sure if SAP_BW 758 component is compatible with our system.

Do I need to map new SD Routes also in EWM in an embedded System? I know there is an customizing for external decentral ewm but are there any settings in case ov an embedded system?

thx

br

doepat

entry.title: Re: Hello guys.
entry.content: I interested to study SAP FI S4HANA

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps composer pro feature requests
entry.content:
Thanks for all that ... I will definitely read up on all this permission granting stuff.

I just wanted to say that in my app when I ask the user to pick an image, I manually set he permissions going into my settings screens of my iPhone. I'm not specifically discussing the asking of permission by the app but the actual capability of the app to do what it wants. So I manually turned off camera and images for the preview app, and I could not pick images. But when I manually turned on images for the app I still could not pick images. Only when I granted camera permission to the app was it able to pick images.

I don't know how it works, and it could be that the app itself checked permissions of the camera, because it wanted them, and then decided not to allow the user to pick an image. All that seems a little weird but possible. I just want to make it clear it wasn't just an issue of being asked by the app.

entry.title: Re: Everything you need to know about MRP Areas in S/4HANA
entry.content: Hi Caetano - Excellend Information. I have one question though. If I want to run MRP Live for specific MRP Area, what needs to be done? Do we need to use Classic MRP by defining user exit? As I understand in MRP Live, there is no option for selecting MRP Area.

entry.title: How to read Master Data Consolidation Process ID?
entry.content: How to read Consolidation Process ID inside USMD_RULE_SERVICE BADI i.e. inside Check entity method

entry.title: Re: Now available: ABAP Platform Trial
entry.content:
Hello,

I wanted to install again the image and I have this error when trying to pull the image:

Arngrim  D:\  11:45  docker pull sapse/abap-platform-trial
Using default tag: latest
Error response from daemon: manifest for sapse/abap-platform-trial:latest not found: manifest unknown: manifest unknown
Arngrim  D:\  11:46  docker pull sapse/abap-platform-trial:1909
Error response from daemon: manifest for sapse/abap-platform-trial:1909 not found: manifest unknown: manifest unknown

Could you check what is wrong with the image?

Thanks & regards

entry.title: Re: Now available: ABAP Platform Trial
entry.content:
Hi Denis, you have to use the good tag : docker pull sapse/abap-platform-trial:1909_SP01.

To SAP Team, it will be simple to use the tag latest to avoid this king of miss understanding.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to use attributes.ExampleCustomAttribute in a SAP BPA Process?
entry.content: The api is referring to attributes modeled in Visibility tab of Process details. You can model up to 15 simple typed attributes, by mapping to variables in the context. In the example, ExampleCustomAttribute is the Id of an attribute.

Renuka

entry.title: Reporting data generated for disabled tracking workarea
entry.content:
Hello,

I didn't turn on the "Tracking Back End" option to my standard content connected workarea. I also didn't create assignment to it. But the reporting data for the standard content is appearing in Reporting options of the manager. How is this possible?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to start multiple hybirs locally.
entry.content:
If you have a look in hybris/bin/platform/project.properties you'll find commented properties about which ports are set. Generally the 3 you want to set to avoid collisions are

tomcat.http.port
tomcat.ssl.port
tomcat.ajp.port

Set them in each developer's local.properties

You need to run ant afterwards because it uses these properties to generate the Tomcat server.xml that defines the connectors.

You can avoid having to set tomcat.ajp.port by commenting out / removing the line

${tomcat.connectors.ajp.plain}

in hybris/config/tomcat/conf/server.xml (the template from which the running server.xml is generated)
AJP is only useful if you're putting Apache HTTPD in front of Tomcat. If the value of tomcat.ajp.port is unset then it wouldn't add the AJP connector but unfortunately at some point SAP added a default value for this setting in the platform project.properties so you can't unset it.

You also need to consider if your developers want to run the server in debug mode which also needs a unique port. You need to update the setting below and value of the address property from 8000 to something unique

tomcat.debugjavaoptions=-Djava.locale.providers=COMPAT,CLDR -Xdebug -Xnoagent -Xrunjdwp:transport=dt_socket,server=y,address=8000,suspend=n

Again, run ant after changing this.

Spoiler
ant deploy or ant server is the minimum you need to run or just ant or ant all will work but run a build too.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I identify as a person in the below categories:

People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location 
First generation college students

Driven by my extensive interest in SAP, I've taken courses on Udemy to enhance my knowledge and skills. Now, standing at the midpoint of my career, I am eager to embrace the SAP domain wholeheartedly. The SAP Digital Skills Initiative presents an invaluable opportunity for me to learn, grow, and obtain certification, allowing me to propel my career forward in the SAP landscape.

With utmost gratitude, I seek your support and acceptance of my application. Being selected to join this initiative would not only fulfill my aspirations but also enable me to contribute significantly to the SAP domain.

Thank you for considering my application, and I eagerly await the chance to participate in this life-changing opportunity.

entry.title: Retrieve a CSV file by API: only first row is retrieved
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm trying to retrieve a csv file from a rest API, but when the body is retrieved I have only the first row of csv. Below how I do, where is the mistake? (with Postman is ok)

Many thanks in advance.

example of csv

"sf__Id","sf__Error",Cod_cliente__c,Name,Partita_iva__c,Indirizzo__CountryCode__s,Indirizzo__StateCode__s,Indirizzo__City__s,Indirizzo__PostalCode__s,Indirizzo__Street__s

0008000141,COMPANY 1 S.P.A.,IT0201124,IT,PD,Padova,35020,"VIA test, 2"

cl_http_client=>create_by_url

go_http_client->request->set_header_fields( fields = lt_header_fields ).

go_http_client->request->set_method( if_http_request=>co_request_method_get ).

go_http_client->send

go_http_client->receive

gv_response = go_http_client->response->get_cdata( ).

here I have only the first row

entry.title: SAP Fiori: How to perform masking for Fiori applications with oData V4?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have implemented masking for Fiori applications. But as per the SAP Note: 2110725 OData V4.0 version is not supported for masking .We already have add-ons "UIDP-100" and "UIDPUI5-100" installed and masking solution is working for Fiori applications which are based on OData V2.0 version. Is there a solution already available for masking of such applications based on OData V4.0 version?

Regards,

Sumangala

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Re: unable to do bank reconciliation in sap b1
entry.content:
Hello,

 

The balance you're seeing is the last reconciliation balance, if this is the first time doing the reconciliation, then it's correct.

Just proceed and enter the bank statement balance to continue with the reconciliation.

I hope this helps.

I hope to learn and be better version of myself as a professional and personal through this volunteering event and knowledge sharing session.

 

SAP Inside Track #SIT Kolkata #Kolkata #SITKOL2024

entry.title: Create Quiz App with Cloud Foundry Python Buildpack
entry.content:
Introduction:

In this blog post, I will explain how to use Business application studio to create a python app in BTP cloud foundry.

Prerequisite:

Tutorial Link: Create an Application with Cloud Foundry Python Buildpack

Setup:

  1. Create a new dev space. 
  2. Create a new project from template of type basic multi-target application.
  3. Create a directory named 'quizapp' with the structure as below. 
  4. The contents of files are as below. 'manifest.yml' contains the application name.

 

 

 

applications:
- name: QuizApp

 

 

 

  • runtime.txt :

 

 

 

python-3.11.7

 

 

 

  • requirements.txt:

 

 

 

requests~=2.31.0
flask~=3.0.2
gunicorn~=21.2.0​

 

 

 

  • Procfile:

 

 

 

web: gunicorn -b 0.0.0.0:$PORT app:app​

 

 

 

  • app.py:

 

 

 

from flask import Flask, render_template, request
import requests
import random

list_of_questions = []
DB_URL = "https://opentdb.com/api.php"
list_of_options = {
    "Books": 10,
    "Film": 11,
    "Music": 12,
    "Television": 14,
    "Video Games": 15,
    "Comics": 29
}

app = Flask(__name__)


@app.route('/')
def home():
    return render_template('home.html', options=list(list_of_options.keys()))


@app.route('/quiz', methods=['POST'])
def display_quiz():
    selected_option = request.form['choice']
    query_params = {
        "amount": 30,
        "category": list_of_options[selected_option],
        "type": "multiple"
    }
    response = requests.get(url=DB_URL, params=query_params)
    data = response.json()['results']
    random.shuffle(data)
    global list_of_questions
    list_of_questions = []
    list_of_questions = data[:10]
    for ques in list_of_questions:
        options = ques['incorrect_answers']
        options.append(ques['correct_answer'])
        random.shuffle(options)
        ques['options'] = options

    return render_template('quiz.html', questions=list_of_questions)


@app.route('/submit', methods=['POST'])
def submit_quiz():
    score = 0
    for index, ques in enumerate(list_of_questions, start=1):
        user_answer = request.form.get(f"question_{index}")
        correct_answer = ques['correct_answer']
        if user_answer == correct_answer:
            score += 1

    return render_template('result.html', score=score)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    app.run()
​

 

 

 

  • home.html

 

 

 

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <link href="static/home.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="icon" href="{{ url_for('static', filename='favicon.ico') }}" type="image/x-icon">
    <title>Category for Entertainment Quiz</title>
</head>
<body>
 <h1>Do you have a passion for entertainment?</h1>
    <form action="{{url_for('display_quiz')}}" method="post">
        <label for="dropdown">Select a category for Quiz:</label>
        <select id="dropdown" name="choice">
            {% for option in options %}
                <option value="{{ option }}">{{ option }}</option>
            {% endfor %}
        </select>
        <br><br>
        <input type="submit" value="Submit">
    </form>
</body>
</html>​

 

 

 

  • quiz.html

 

 

 

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <link href="static/quiz.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="icon" href="{{ url_for('static', filename='favicon.ico') }}" type="image/x-icon">
    <title>Entertainment Quiz</title>
</head>
<body>
    <h1>Quiz Questions</h1>
    <form action="{{ url_for('submit_quiz') }}" method="post">
        <ol>
            {% set question_index = namespace(value=1) %}
            {% for ques in questions %}
                <li>
                    <p>{{ loop.index }}. {{ ques['question'] | safe }}</p>
                    <ul>
                        {% for option in ques['options'] %}
                            <li>
                                <label>
                                    <input type="radio" name="question_{{question_index.value}}"  value="{{ option }}">
                                    {{ option | safe}}
                                </label>
                            </li>
                        {% endfor %}
                        {% set question_index.value=question_index.value+1 %}
                    </ul>
                </li>
            {% endfor %}
        </ol>
        <input type="submit" value="Submit">
    </form>
</body>
</html>
​

 

 

 

  • result.html

 

 

 

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <link href="static/result.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="icon" href="{{ url_for('static', filename='favicon.ico') }}" type="image/x-icon">
    <title>Quiz Result</title>
</head>
<body>
    <h1>Quiz Result</h1>
    <div id="result-container">
        <p>Your score is: {{ score }} out of 10</p>
    </div>
</body>
</html>
​

 

 

 

  • For css files, you can style as per your preference.

Deploy

Log in to SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry environment:

 

 

 

cf login

 

 

 

Deploy the application on Cloud Foundry:

 

 

 

cf push

 

 

 

After successful deployment, the application will be visible in dev space.

 

Conclusion:

  1. Flask web framework is used along with Jinja2 template. All the html files are inside 'templates' folder and all css/image files are under the 'static' folder.
  2. For quiz question generation, Trivia API is used.
  3. Demo Execution: Video link.

entry.title: Re: Streams in RAP : Uploading PDF , Excel and Other Files in RAP Application
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

If you're encountering the error "The file is too big. The maximum size allowed is 0.000 MB.", the solution is simple. Check the size of the field (attachment content) in your table. That size will be the maximum file size allowed.

For example: I tested it here with a file up to 265 characters, and the upload worked. If I add just one more character, it starts to give an error.



Simply increase this size to solve the problem, or set it to zero for "unlimited".

I tested today (March 3, 2024) in the SAP BTP Trial environment, using both OData V2 and V4. The only difference is that in V2, instead of displaying a popup warning of the error, it resulted in a DUMP.

@ashutosh9112 @termanico

I am keenly interested to actively participate in this event and I will feel myself honoured if I can support in any form to make the event a grand success.

Being a ABAP developer, I am seeing this event to connect with people from same domain and to be in touch with people from various industries and domains. 

#SAPinsidetrackkolkata. #SIT

#SAP. @DataTherapist  Looking forward for all your inputs to make this event a grand success.

entry.title: IAS as proxy
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have configured SAP IAS as a proxy to Azure AD.

The groups from Azure AD (Groups Claim) are mapped to SAP BTP under "Role Collections" -> "User Groups"->Object ID from Azure Group.

However, how can I map or synchronize the groups that I have created in IAS to SAP BTP?

Is it to recommended to map  the groups from Azure to IAS ?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: SAP hana_ml ARIMAX with SAP AI Core
entry.content: Thank you! This is very helpful!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
As someone deeply invested in expanding my professional horizons, I find myself uniquely suited for this digital skills training program for several reasons.

With a comprehensive background in Business, Business Information Systems, and Information Technology from my degree, complemented by my experience as an ex-Prince 2 Practitioner, I am keen on taking the next step in my career journey through this digital skills training.

Studying the degree to become a SAP consultant in the late 90s was a pivotal decision for me. It was during this time that I identified the immense potential of SAP as it transitioned from R2 to R3. This foresight led me on a path to understanding and specializing in SAP consult expertise in FI/CO MM, which later became a key aspect of my career.

Previously, I worked as an executive search consultant specializing in placing SAP consult expertise in FI/CO MM. In this role, I was responsible for the placement of SAP professionals within large Management Consulting firms, SAP Consulting Firms, and large corporate companies that utilized SAP. This experience has provided me with a deep understanding of the intricate needs and demands of the tech industry.

As a supply chain specialist, I successfully improved supply chain operations by 60% for Homeserve within 18 months. This achievement was made possible by leveraging my sales skills and process improvement techniques learned during my Business Information Systems studies.

My passion for embracing new technologies is a driving force in my career. I believe that staying current with digital advancements is not just an advantage but a necessity in today's rapidly evolving landscape. This training would equip me with the tools to navigate this terrain with confidence.

Moreover, my adaptability and eagerness to learn make me a prime candidate for this opportunity. I thrive in environments that challenge me to think innovatively and creatively, traits that I believe align perfectly with the objectives of this training.

In essence, I am enthusiastic about the prospect of participating in this digital skills training program, as I am confident it will not only enhance my capabilities but also empower me to make a substantial impact. I look forward to the possibility of being part of this exciting journey!

entry.title: Re: SIT Kolkata 2024 Interest
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Since I started working in SAP back in 2022, I always wondered if there is a community or club or group where people can come, share knowledge regarding various modules of SAP, their interconnections between each other...and integration with AI and myriad thoughts! I was not aware about SIT Kolkata, 2023. Such a naive I was. Just after the event happened last year with a grand success, I connected with @DataTherapist and realized that Oh! I missed a great opportunity. Then I joined the SAP kolkata community and since then I have connected with lot of people working in Supply Chain Management (using SAP softwares) in Kolkata.

Being an APO/IBP functional consultant, I look forward to connect with more people in SIT Kolkata who are working in same area and share knowledge as much as possible and stay connected with each other.

I am eager to volunteer in SIT Kolkata, 2024 and it will be a great learning experience if I can work with a team and add value by learning and unlearning from all of you who are part of this event!

SAP Inside TrackKolkata

#SIT_Kolkata_2024

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Managed Router SESSION_CONTEXT db module APPLICATIONUSER vcap
entry.content:
Hello,

I am build a CAP model project with a managed router with UI. All xsuaa roles is working as expected when coming through the CAP services.

However, when trying to access SESSION_CONTEXT at the DB module. APPLICATIONUSER is returning vcap.

The same issue was raised before as below but the solution provided not applicable as the cds version is higher here.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/session-context-application-user-in-cap/qaq-p/12145018

The only difference I can see is that I am using the managed approuter. Seems like the user logged in is not passing to the session_context at the db level.

Hope somebody can shed some light into the matter.

Anand

I have tried booster and manually created abap enviroinment , its of no use

Need your solution ...

entry.title: Issue with value help for Custom Query
entry.content:
Hello all,

I try to realize a "F4 help" with these values for the attribute DueItem of an accounting document:


and tried to achieve this according to this solved subject Solved: Not Able to get F4 Help in Analytics query - SAP Community .
With these two CDS views I can display the above shown values

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZTMPDUEITTXTV'
@ObjectModel.dataCategory: #TEXT
@ObjectModel.representativeKey: 'DueItemType'
@Search.searchable: true  
define view ZTMP_I_DueItemTextView 
  with parameters
    P_KeyDate   : vdm_v_key_date,
    P_TodayDate : abap.dats,
    P_Language  : sylangu
  as select distinct from P_APLineItem_1(P_KEYDATE : :P_KeyDate, P_TodayDate : :P_TodayDate, P_Language : :P_Language){
    key DueItemType,
    @Semantics.text: true            
    @Search.defaultSearchElement: true
    case AccountingDocumentCategory
        when 'S' then //Noted items
             'Merkposten'
        when 'V' then //Parked document
             'Vorerf.Posten'
        when 'W' then //Parked document with change of document ID
             'Debitorenposten'
        else          //Normal Document
            case when SpecialGLCode = '' then
                   'normale Posten'
                else
                  'Sonderhauptbuchvorgänge'
            end
      end   as DueItemTypeText
}

 

and 

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZTMPDUEITF4HELP'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@EndUserText.label: 'TMP: View mit Art des Postens für DueItem'
define view ZTMP_I_DueItemValueHelp 
  with parameters
    P_KeyDate   : vdm_v_key_date,
    P_TodayDate : abap.dats,
    P_Language  : sylangu
  as select distinct from P_APLineItem_1(P_KEYDATE : :P_KeyDate, P_TodayDate : :P_TodayDate, P_Language : :P_Language)
  association [0..1] to Z60FI_I_DueItemTextView as _Z60FI_I_DueItemTextView 
  on $projection.DueItemType = _Z60FI_I_DueItemTextView.DueItemType
{  
    @ObjectModel.text.association: '_Text'
    @Search.defaultSearchElement: true
    key DueItemType                                                             as DueItemTypeF4,
    @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_DueItemText'    
    _Z60FI_I_DueItemTextView(P_KeyDate:$parameters.P_KeyDate, 
                             P_TodayDate:$parameters.P_TodayDate,
                             P_Language:$parameters.P_Language).DueItemTypeText as DueItemTypeTextF4    
}

 

but when I try to use this in a consumption view like  this:

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZTMP_C_APLII'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@EndUserText.label: 'TMP: Consumption View für Kred.posten bearb.'
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@ObjectModel.representativeKey: 'FiscalPeriod'
@ObjectModel.usageType.sizeCategory: #XXL
@ObjectModel.usageType.dataClass:  #MIXED
@ObjectModel.usageType.serviceQuality: #D
@VDM.viewType: #CONSUMPTION
@Analytics: { dataCategory: #CUBE }
@Analytics.dataExtraction.enabled : true
@ClientHandling.algorithm: #SESSION_VARIABLE
@AbapCatalog.buffering.status: #NOT_ALLOWED
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@Metadata.allowExtensions:true
define view ZTMP_C_ApLineItem 
with parameters
P_KeyDate    : vdm_v_key_date,
@Environment.systemField: #SYSTEM_DATE
P_TodayDate : sydate,
P_Language  : sylangu,
P_TimeRestrictionStartDate   : farp_time_restrict_start_date
as select from
P_APLineItem_0(P_KeyDate : :P_KeyDate, P_TodayDate : :P_TodayDate, P_Language : :P_Language
) as I_APLineItem
--  association [0..1] to Z60FI_I_DueItemValueHelp   as _DueItem                     on  $projection.DueItemType = _DueItem.DueItemType
                                                                                   
{
  key CompanyCode,
  key cast( AccountingDocument as fis_belnr preserving type )                          as  AccountingDocument,
  key FiscalYear,
  key AccountingDocumentItem,
  --      @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_DueItem.DueItemTypeText'
      @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: {
                       association: 
                         [{ entity : { name    : 'Z60FI_I_DueItemValueHelp4',                 
                                       element : 'DueItemTypeF4'},
                                       additionalBinding  : [{ localElement   : 'DueItemType',
                                                               element        : 'DueItemTypeTextF4'
                                                            }]
                                    }]
                      }
      @EndUserText.label: 'Art des Postens'
      cast( DueItemType as farp_due_item_category )                                    as  DueItemType,
      @DefaultAggregation:#SUM
      @Semantics.currencyCode: true
      cast( CompanyCodeCurrency as fis_hwaer preserving type )                         as  CompanyCodeCurrency,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'
      cast( AmountInCompanyCodeCurrency as dmshb_farp )                                as  AmountInCompanyCodeCurrency      
  }

 

in KUA F1572 "Custom Query" no value help shows up:

What might be the reason for this behaviour?
Best regards, Martin

entry.title: Re: SB1-Ocorreu erro interno (-1002) [Mensagem 131-183]
entry.content: Na verdade, é instalar o Microsoft ODBC Driver 'XX' for SQL Server. Onde XX se da para a versão do SQL que é o banco dados. Toda máquina com um client instalado que precisa se comunicar com o banco precisa disso.

entry.title: Configuration for IM & PS integration
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Our company is creating project from appropriation request . Where is the configuration point to make this happen ? 

Thanking you in advance . 

Mohammed

entry.title: Re: Automate your Excel to Datasphere upload
entry.content:
Hi @armaansingla1992,

Thanks for testing the code and providing feedback.

The links are simply created if more than 80% of the non-missing entries in the dimension and fact tables match. For performance reasons, only the first column of the dimension table is compared to the fact table entries, and composite primary keys are not supported. A snowflake schema is also not supported. So associations between multiple dimension tables are not analysed. These could be reasons why associations are not created in a complex example.

Best regards

Henri

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

Iam eagerly waiting for their reply and voucher to make a purchase for giving certification attempt for SAP C_CPI.

Kindly expedite the process.

entry.title: Re: How to clear IR for PO free
entry.content:
Hi,

Free means nothing pay to supplier and hence no invoice! 

Technically, if you flag the free indicator, the invoice indicator will be removed and there wont be conditions tab in the PO item.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to restrict the user to create PO only with refer...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please refer the note # 1884517 - Cannot set reference PR number field mandatory in PO which explains the technical design and the possible options.

Regards,

entry.title: SAP MDK rule not triggered in List Picker search to handle case sensitive search
entry.content:
Hi,

Can anyone help me with this?

List picker is bound to the rule to return the list picker items, I have search enabled in the list picker to filter the values. When I type a char in the list picker to filter list of the items, only exact matches are returning. 

For ex. List has "Electronics", if I type "elect" it's not retuning any value. If the rule is triggered on char type I can handle the search but its not happening.

Page and rule are below.

{
	"Controls": [
		{
			"_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable",
			"_Name": "SectionedTable0",
			"Sections": [
				{
					"Visible": true,
					"EmptySection": {
						"FooterVisible": false
					},
					"Separators": {
						"TopSectionSeparator": false,
						"BottomSectionSeparator": true,
						"HeaderSeparator": true,
						"FooterSeparator": true,
						"ControlSeparator": true
					},
					"_Type": "Section.Type.FormCell",
					"_Name": "SectionFormCell0",
					"Controls": [
						{
							"_Type": "Control.Type.FormCell.ListPicker",
							"_Name": "FormCellListPicker0",
							"IsVisible": true,
							"Separator": true,
							"AllowMultipleSelection": true,
							"AllowEmptySelection": true,
							"Caption": "Categories",
							"DataPaging": {
								"ShowLoadingIndicator": false,
								"PageSize": 50
							},
							"PickerPrompt": "Please select one single item",
							"IsSelectedSectionEnabled": false,
							"IsPickerDismissedOnSelection": false,
							"IsSearchCancelledAfterSelection": false,
							"AllowDefaultValueIfOneItem": false,
							"IsEditable": true,
							"Search": {
								"Enabled": true
							},
							"PickerItems": "/TestPicker/Rules/LoadList.js"
						}
					]
				}
			],
			"FilterFeedbackBar": {
				"ShowAllFilters": false,
				"_Type": "Control.Type.FilterFeedbackBar"
			}
		}
	],
	"_Type": "Page",
	"_Name": "TestListPkrWithRule",
	"Caption": "TestListPkrWithRule",
	"PrefersLargeCaption": true
}

Rule:

/**
 * Describe this function...
 * @param {IClientAPI} clientAPI
 */
export default function LoadList(clientAPI) {
    return [
        {
          "DisplayValue": "Electronics",
          "ReturnValue": "ELE100"
        },
        {
          "DisplayValue": "Electricals",
          "ReturnValue": "ELE200"
        },
        {
          "DisplayValue": "Furniture",
          "ReturnValue": "FUR"
        }
      ];
}

 @bill_froelich any idea this works in MDK? or any other param in the page that I missed?

entry.title: V0 error - PY ZA
entry.content:
Good Day,

May you kindly assist, i am getting the below error on Infotype 0011 wage types during payroll retro run:

"V0 error. The same V0 key already exist with a different vinfo field"

How do i resolve this error? This is only happening on selected employees and it doesn't come up in the current period if there is no retro run.

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: SAP SAC - Publish Private version to Public. Not all data getting copied
entry.content:
Hi,

I am doing Publish from Private version to already existing public version from which I created my Private version. Not all data is getting copied even though as you can see changes in the Budget numbers

LTP 2025-2034 is public version from which DCE private version is been created. But when I go to Publish it back to Public version nothing changes.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning: Advanced formula to Cro...
entry.content:
@bautayakool 

Sorry for late response, I had to create a similar model to better understand the product swap. The below code will do the trick.


VARIABLEMEMBER #Temp2 OF [d/ZPRODUCT_V2]
VARIABLEMEMBER #P OF [d/ZPRODUCT]

AGGREGATE_DIMENSIONS = [d/ZACTIVITY_TYPE],[d/ZACCOUNT_TEST]
AGGREGATE_WRITETO [d/ZACCOUNT_TEST] = "5110002"
AGGREGATE_WRITETO [d/ZACTIVITY_TYPE] = "#"

DATA( [d/ZPRODUCT_V2] = #Temp2, [d/Measures] = "Amount") = RESULTLOOKUP( [d/Measures] = "Amount") / RESULTLOOKUP( [d/Measures] = "Quantity")
DATA([d/ZPRODUCT]=#P)=RESULTLOOKUP([d/ZPRODUCT]=[d/ZPRODUCT_V2],[d/ZPRODUCT_V2] = #Temp2, [d/Measures] = "Amount")
DATA([d/Measures] = "Amount") = (RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Quantity")/RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Quantity"))* RESULTLOOKUP([d/ZPRODUCT]=#P, [d/Measures] = "Amount",[d/ZASSEMBLY]="#")

 

Output:

 

Hope this helps. Please close the thread by accepting the helpful answer.

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SAC Flat Presentation of Hierarchy - show ID instead...
entry.content:
@Chris1983 

Table_3.getDataSource().setHierarchy("RegionStructure",Alias.FlatHierarchy);

This is setting the Region Hierarchy to flat view.

I am not sure when you mean show id, you mean show id of region in Table. Have you tried adjusting the display option for region in the table?

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Calculated measures based on restricted measures
entry.content:
@chrissoftinent 

try setting the Enable constant selection checkbox in both Restricted Measures and remove version dimension from your table axis ( row/column)

 

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins: Week 4
entry.content:
Audit-logging

Notification

Telemetry

entry.title: Re: How to get Total in advance formulas
entry.content:
@Vasu_Sac 

Looking at the screenshot of the table and assuming the forecast ratio is on MG # ( second table). The below should work on Actuals

MEMBERSET [d/CompCode] = (%CCODE_Input%)
MEMBERSET [d/SalesGroup] = (%SGroup_Input%)
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = %FYMonth_Input%
VARIABLEMEMBER #TMG OF [d/MatGroup]

DATA([d/MatGroup] = #TMG ) = RESULTLOOKUP( [d/Measures] = "Sales_Input")
DATA([d/Measures] = "Sales_Forecast") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/MatGroup] = #TMG,[d/Measures] = "Sales_Input" ) /
RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Forecast_Ratio",  [d/MatGroup] = "#")

 

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning - how to prevent inputs on hierarchy nod...
entry.content:
@Guillaume_P_FR 

Unfortunately there is no flexible dynamic option as you cannot leverage attributes in data locking or conditional formatting . At least in conditional formatting locking you can use Self, Sibling, Descendants option so if the hierarchy is not un even in levels you can still achieve some dynamic locking by repeating the nodes, still not realistic though.

 

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Learning Her Way Up: The Inspiring Growth Story of Anu in Norway
entry.content: Amazing story!

entry.title: Re: About Using Text to Speech Feature in SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi Angad,

The issue could be with your browser settings.  Browsers, such as Chrome, block the automatic playback of audio unless you specifically say that audio is allowed to automatically playback for a specific URL.  You can read more about the issue here.  To fix the issue, I have added the following settings to Edge, but you will need to do the same in Chrome is you use Chrome, to get auto play to work.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Schedule resources in a sequence when using scheduling sequence function
entry.content:
Experts,

I have 3 resources

Resource 1 (R1) - FG production (Bom level 1)

R2 - SFG1 (bom level 2)

R3 - SFG2 (bom level 3)

I want to select all these 3 resources at once and do "schedule sequence" for finite feasible production plan in one shot for all my bom levels considering pegging relationships..

When I select them all and hit schedule sequence, in what sequence does sap process the heuristic? Will it first schedule FG resource and then R2 and R3? How does system determine the sequence?

I want first R3 to be scheduled earliest date/ fwd scheduling based on raw mat availability..then R2 based on R3 orders pegging and then R1 based on R2 orders pegging...

entry.title: Asset Down Payment with FB01 not possible in S/4 Hana System
entry.content:
Hi All

I want to post down payment for assets with FB01 with posting key 70 and transaction type 180 but I am getting this error 

"Down payment must be posted as a special general ledger transaction

Message No. FAA_POST082"

on the R/3 system we have, similar posting works is possible without any error.

I will really appreciate any idea on how to resolve this error.

entry.title: Change output and add Columns for LMS Instructor Roster
entry.content:
We would like to change the following things on the roster that you can see with the instructor role:

  • Add new column with Learners Division and Role
  • Convert the report to CSV file (as right now the instructors can only download the report as PDF)

Has anyone had any experience with doing this?

Regards

Brooke

entry.title: Re: Using SAP Datasphere Consumption APIs in SAP Build - A 3-legged Authorization Flow Setup
entry.content:
Hi @js2,

Like the authorization code grant type, the PKCE (Proof Key for Code Exchange) authorization flow adds an additional layer of security, particularly useful in public clients where your key can't be securely stored. In this case we used the destination service to store the client secret and keep it on the backend side.

Whether one is better than the other largely depends on your specific use case. The authorization code flow might be sufficient for most situations where you are dealing with confidential clients, i.e., an application that can secure the client_secret, like a web server. PKCE is generally recommended for public clients such as mobile or JavaScript applications – basically any client that can't keep a secret. Also the PKCE needs to be supported by the IDP in SAP case usually IAS which needs OpenID Connect to be used.

Let me know if you have any questions
Gustavo Kath

entry.title: Re: 【SAP Integration Suite - Open Connectors】Microsoft Power Platform関連のアプリケーションとの連携方法
entry.content:
英語QAで登録されているようなので、そちらで継続するのがいいです。
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-connect-with-quot-microsoft-power-apps-quot-or-quot-microsoft/qaq-p/13621868

想定例は Power Apps から SAP Integration Suite への API コールなので、
Power Apps から API 呼び出しで検索してみるといいです。
カスタムコネクタや Power Automate の情報が見つかります。

こんなツールも検索結果にありました。
https://powerautomate.microsoft.com/en-us/blog/announcing-deeper-sap-integration-for-the-power-platform/

entry.title: Solution Manager Cleanup
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Due to some organizational change, we have copied the production SAP Solution Manager system into a new system.
Now, we have a requirement to cleanup the existing data from the copied system. 
This data includes the following:
- System Landscape Information (LMDB, Solutions, Change Control Landscapes etc.)
- Monitoring Data
- ITSM/ChaRM application data (i.e. Change documents, cycles, Tansports etc.)Please let us know if cleanup of the data is possible and if yes, how the cleanup can be done from the SAP Solution Manager system.Thanks for your support.

**


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Solution Manager Cleanup
entry.content:
Dear *,

Could you please check KBA 1952567 and the Wiki to implement your requirement?

1952567 - How to remove no longer relevant managed systems from Solution Manager

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/sm/3362968232.html

Best regards,
Leo

entry.title: Re: Flexible Batch Scan when entering count for PI Docume...
entry.content:
Hello,

You can activate the functionality of scanning SAP Batch during counting against PI document using SAP latest note

https://me.sap.com/notes/3294052

This note also offers the flexibility of deactivating “Batch verification field”using the verification control configuration in RF framework.


Br

Shailesh Mishra

entry.title: Re: 【SAP Integration Suite - Open Connectors】Microsoft Power Platform関連のアプリケーションとの連携方法
entry.content:
@masa_139 さん
ご返信ありがとうございます。
英語で質問させていただいた後、送った返信に対しての反応がなかったため、
Tokyoグループにいらっしゃるスペシャリストな有識者の皆様にご意見を頂きたく、こちらでも質問させていただきました。
英語の質問に対する回答は引き続き確認させていただきます。

カスタムコネクタを作成してAPI呼び出しをするという情報ありがとうございます。
ちょっとAPI周りまだ知見が足りていないので色々検証していきます。

Power Automete側のSAP統合の情報もありがとうございます。
こちらも確認させていただきます。

Yuya

entry.title: Automatic population of measuring Point PRT in Iw42
entry.content:
Since the user are forgetting to creating measuring document during time confirmation, we want it to be automatic populated ,so that the user can see the measuring point assigned as PRT for this operation and they will update it while performing time confirmation using IW42.

I haven't found any configuration or any relevant user exit to get this populated(Import and export parameters). 

Would like to know if you have some experience. Thank you. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Automatic population of measuring Point PRT in Iw42
entry.content: Failed to find out existing user exits to fulfil this requirement.

entry.title: hi need sap support
entry.content: Our Sap is having problems with Numbering documents. Need someone to fix in our server.

entry.title: Fiori Elements アノテーションが反映されない
entry.content:
Fiori Elementsのテンプレートを使用して、Guided Developmentを使ってアプリの作成を行っています。
データ型・必須・桁数をFiori側で制御するため、Gitのソースを参考にAnnotation.xmlを作成しましたが、
次のエラーが出力され、定義したデータ制約は反映されていませんでした。
解決策をご教示いただけないでしょうか。

【エラー内容】
Unknown Sub-Element: <EntityType> only [Annotations,Annotation] Sub-Elements are allowed xml-server 

【実現したいこと】
ProjectsEntityのカラムに対してデータ型・Type・必須の条件を追加し、フィルターの入力欄に反映したい

【参考文献】
１：アノテーションの使用 
２：ソースコードでの編集

entry.title: Re: NetWeaver HTTP/2 request duplicating ":authority" pseudo-header?
entry.content: FWIW, this issue has now been resolved in the latest Kyma production release, which uses a newer Istio release that includes the Envoy proxy fixes.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning: Advanced formula to Cro...
entry.content: I have tried your code and it worked! I will try to test this code with some other test cases, but I think I can continue on from here. Thank you very much for you help!

entry.title: Track how many models use a BW query as source in SAC
entry.content: Hi all, we have created a lot of import models in SAC using BW queries, is there any way to see a statistics which shows the BW queries used in creation of models as well has how many models were created using a specific BW query other than going into the data management of a model.

entry.title: SAP 分析云 2024.03 版新功能抢先看
entry.content:
SAP 分析云是一款先进的商务分析云解决方案，集商业智能 (BI)、增强分析、预测分析和企业规划功能于一体，消除单点解决方案和数据孤岛挑战，能提供您需要的全面云分析功能。

本文介绍了 SAP 分析云 2024.03 版本的新功能。这些新功能已经在 SAP 分析云 FastTrack 客户的系统上线。对于 SAP 分析云季度发布周期 (QRC) 客户，此版本及其功能将作为 QRC 2024 年第2季度版本的一部分提供。这里可以查看 QRC 发布时间表。

系统和技术要求

尽管不是必需的，我们推荐您升级到最新的 SAP 分析云代理版本 1.0.397，利用所有数据采集类型。

除以下情况外，您的代理需要1.0.75或以上版本：

  • SAP ERP/SQL 数据库版本1.0.99
  • SAP Universe (UNX)版本1.0.365（ SAP分析云代理需要额外的设置步骤，有关详细信息，请参阅 SAP 说明3262098）
  • SAP Business Warehouse (BW)版本1.0.353
  • SAP HANA View版本1.0.235
  • File Server版本1.0.248

更多详细信息，请参阅系统要求和技术先决条件。

有关将 SAP BW 与 SAP 分析云集成的受支持功能和所需更新，请参阅 SAP Note 2541557 以了解更多详细信息。

有关通过 SAP BusinessObjects Live Data Connect 与 SAP 分析云来实时访问 Universe 时的受支持功能和所需更新，请参阅 SAP Note 2771921 以了解更多详细信息。

请从“Service Marketplace”下载最新版本的“简易部署工具箱”。

  • 为避免下载旧版本并可能让用户面对 Cloud Connector 与 SAPJVM 或 Apache Tomcat 的绑定不当带来的漏洞，只有三个最新版本可供下载。

关于云代理的版本变更管理细节，请参考 SAP Note 3264839。
 

更新亮点

  • 系统与服务管理
    • 管理员对用户配置文件设置的集中控制 |（SAP路线图浏览器）
  • 增强分析
    • 计划预测 - 在故事中展示预测区间 |（SAP路线图浏览器）
  • 数据集成
    • 支持 SAP Integrated Business Planning 连接类型的 x.509 证书
  • 企业计划
    • 高级公式 – 分析模型作为源，使用链接函数 | （SAP 路线图浏览器）
    • 多步操作 – 从对话框中复制外部API的URL等信息  | （SAP 路线图浏览器）
    • 计划流程管理 - 用于故事和分析应用的扩展API | （SAP 路线图浏览器）
    • 数据操作中跨模型复制步骤的数据清理
  • Microsoft Office集成
    • Microsoft Excel的插件 - 重新设计设计面板的标题 | （SAP 路线图浏览器）
    • Microsoft Excel中静态报告的格式设置 | （SAP 路线图浏览器）
  • 故事设计
    • 主题首选项中的新格式选项
    • 通配符筛选器（不包括SAP BW和SAP IBP）
  • 故事拓展性
    • 数据变化洞察群发模式支持
    • 通过REST API 将数字点集成到SAP Mobile Start中

 

系统和服务管理

管理员对用户配置文件设置的集中控制

通过全局用户首选项设置，管理员现在可以集中控制默认用户配置文件设置。更改可以仅应用于新用户，也可以应用于所有用户。这让用户不再需要手动配置语言、日期格式、数字格式和电子邮件通知。（SAP路线图浏览器）

 



 

增强分析

计划预测- 在故事中展示预测区间

使用计划预测时，用户可以将预测区间和拟合预测一起保存到专用的计划版本中。

 

数据集成

支持 SAP Integrated Business Planning 连接类型的 x.509 证书

我们很高兴地宣布，本次更新为SAP Integrated Business Planning必要的连接获取了x.509客户端证书身份验证。这为SAP IBP提供了一种新的、安全的身份验证方法。

 

企业计划

高级公式 – 分析模型作为源，使用链接函数

用户现在可以在分析模型的高级公式脚本中使用LINK 函数。(SAP路线图浏览器)

例如:DATA() = LINK([<Analytic Model>]， [d/Dimension] = "member"，…)
 

 

多步操作 – 从对话框中复制外部API 的URL等信息  

在多步操作设置对话框中启用“允许外部API访问”后，用户现在可以选择“显示详细信息”并复制此操作的“多步操作ID”，“触发API URL”或“查询API URL”，用于粘贴到外部应用发送的API请求中。(SAP路线图浏览器)

 计划流程管理 - 用于故事和分析应用的扩展API

我们在优化后的故事体验和分析设计器中添加了新的日历API。(SAP路线图浏览器)

  • createCompositeTask API现在支持contextFilters、reminders、parentId、owners和dependencies等属性。您可以使用createProcess API来创建具有与createCompositeTask API类似属性的日历进程。
  • 您可以使用sendImmediateReminder API向分派者发送带有可选消息的即时提醒。
  • 您可以使用API来更新日历事件，例如其开始和结束日期、进度、所有者、分派者、提醒、上下文过滤器。
  • 您可以使用API来获取日历事件的更多属性，例如其子事件、依赖项、所有者、上下文过滤器和提醒。
  • 您可以使用 reopen API来重新打开日历事件。
  • 以下API已弃用:getCalendarTaskById, getRelatedTaskIds, getCurrentTask。分别使用getCalendarEventById, getRelatedEventIds, getCurrentEvent代替。

 

数据操作中跨模型复制步骤的数据清理

以前在覆盖模式下配置数据操作中的跨模型复制步骤时，没有源上下文过滤器的步骤有时会清除额外的数据。现在，覆盖模式下配置好的跨模型复制步骤只会清除计划中的数据。

 

Microsoft Office集成

Microsoft Excel 的插件

插件的名称由SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Office改为SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Excel。

重新设计设计面板的标题

我们已对设计面板标题进行了更新。根据所选对象的不同，设计面板标题现在会显示表、公式或数据操作触发器的图标及以下信息：(SAP路线图浏览器)

  • 表的数据源名称和表名称。
  • 公式的数据源名称和数据源别名。
  • 数据操作触发器的标签和ID。

用户可从 2024年 1 月 31 日起使用此功能。

 

 

Microsoft Excel中静态报告的格式设置

用户现在可以选择在添加新表时禁用默认格式。渲染后，禁用默认表格格式将保持Excel格式。这为用户能够基于本地Excel格式（包括条件格式）为报表创建高度个性化的格式。但是，这种格式不支持展开和折叠操作。(SAP路线图浏览器)

 

故事设计

主题偏好中新的格式选项

我们在主题首选项中引入了额外的格式化选项，以便能够创建类似IBCS的“主题”。

  • 数级格式（k, m, bn 或者千，百万，十亿）
  • 绝对值或者小数位数百分比
  • 货币格式（系统默认值、ISO代码和符号）

 请注意以下限制:

  • 仅可用于统计图和表格
  • 货币格式的格式选项仅限于主题首选项
  • 配置绝对值vs小数百分比的选项仅限于主题首选项

     

通配符筛选器(不包括SAP BW和SAP IBP)

我们已将不基于时间的维改名，从按范围筛选改为按条件筛选。

我们增加了包括文本匹配与通配符的新选项。

  • 对于文本匹配与通配符，我们支持在查看模式下取消成员的选择，但不支持编辑单个语句
  • 对于匹配模式，我们支持*(abcde)形式的匹配任意数量的字符模式和?(x)形式的在特定位置匹配单个字母

本功能还新建了一个模块名为“限制”，它将根据所设置的条件排除仅供查看者读取的值

  • 设计者可以选择是否对查看者隐藏限制

请注意以下限制:

  • BW或IBP不支持这一功能
  • 层次结构不支持基础比较操作符（即Between、Greater Than等）和匹配模式
  • (No Value)成员不会被文本匹配找到，因为它在后端不是一个真正的成员
  • 匹配模式限制为?和*运算符

 

故事拓展性

数据变化洞察群发模式支持

用户现在可以在订阅数据变化洞察时选择群发模式。在群发模式下，故事查看者会根据自己的权限（而不是调度者的权限）接收数据变化洞察。

 


通过REST API 将数字点集成到SAP Mobile Start中

应用程序开发人员可以通过故事ID和微件ID调用REST API，以访问优化故事体验中的数字图表小部件中的数据。这样用户将可以在SAP Mobile Start中使用微件。

 



本文仅提供 SAP 分析云的最新功能和增强功能的高级概述。您可以在针对FastTrack客户的应用内帮助指南中找到有关这些功能的更多详细信息，如果您想了解更多关于FastTrack和季度发布周期发布的信息，请参阅这篇SAP知识库文章。

entry.title: Alternative reconciliation account field for Supplier Invoice API in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, experts,

  • I'm trying to use Supplier Invoice API in SAP Public Cloud(Inbount Async),  would like to input alternative reconciliation account through the API. But the API doesn't have the field for the alternative reconciliation account".   Is there any solution to input the alternative reconciliation account through SAP cloud API "Supplier Invoice"? 　Supplier Invoice | SAP Help Portal
  • The reason I use "Supplier Invoice" is that SAP recommends to use "Supplier Invoice" for Account Payable input.  I would like to make sure that we can input reconciliation account using the API as in "Create Vendor Invoice". 

Regards,

  • Regards,
